layer3_inference: SCADA may be executing a programmed post-trip ramp-up sequence (hidden move)
rejection_reason: SPECULATIVE classification (3 assumptions per Layer 3's own assessment). Per burden of proof protocol, speculative inferences are stripped from scoring and do not influence tactical recommendation. Additionally, CL-001 and CL-004 explicitly guard against inferring SCADA internal states beyond what telemetry reports.

layer3_inference: Demand source (Fire Department) likely action — unknown, requires 3+ assumptions
rejection_reason: SPECULATIVE classification with no supporting data. Per CL-017, this inference class has been consistently rejected. The demand source is structurally opaque — any inference about its status or intent is speculation by definition within this data architecture.

layer3_inference: Grid operators may be performing off-log contingency actions
rejection_reason: SPECULATIVE classification with no supporting data. Layer 3 itself identified this as the most thoroughly vetted and consistently rejected inference in the entire analysis chain. Per CL-009, CL-012, CL-016: this class of inference is rejected on sight.
